claim: Docker MCP Catalog provides one-click installation of MCP servers (YouTube, Slack, Obsidian, GitHub) without manual JSON configuration
actionable: Use Docker Desktop MCP Catalog instead of manual MCP setup; click to add servers, auto-generates config, reduces setup from hours to minutes.
source_title: Docker Just Made Using MCP Servers 100x Easier

claim: MCP servers run as ephemeral Docker containers: tool calls spin up a container, execute, then tear down—no persistent memory overhead
actionable: Scale MCP deployments without fear of resource exhaustion; containers only consume resources during tool execution, making multi-tool agents cost-efficient.
source_title: Docker Just Made Using MCP Servers 100x Easier

claim: Docker MCP Gateway is open-source orchestration for MCP servers; runs locally on port 8089 via HTTP-streaming transport for custom agents
actionable: Run `docker mcp gateway --port 8089` locally; connect custom agents (n8n, Python, LiveKit) via localhost:8089 to reuse Docker's MCP catalog servers.
source_title: Docker Just Made Using MCP Servers 100x Easier

claim: MCP server catalog (Fetch, Slack, Playwright, YouTube, Notion, GitHub, Stripe) reaches 500k+ downloads; continuously growing with new integrations
actionable: Check Docker MCP Catalog monthly for new server additions; current coverage includes web scraping, project management, communication, and finance tools.
source_title: Docker Just Made Using MCP Servers 100x Easier

claim: Agentic workflows with MCP: transcribe YouTube, summarize to Obsidian, read Slack context, create GitHub issue, trigger Claude Code—all in 10 minutes
actionable: Build multi-tool workflows by connecting MCP servers: combine YouTube, Obsidian, Slack, GitHub, Claude Code for research-to-implementation pipelines.
source_title: Docker Just Made Using MCP Servers 100x Easier

claim: Gordon (Docker's built-in AI agent, beta) can test MCP servers before connecting to external clients like Claude Desktop
actionable: Use Gordon's toolbox to quickly test MCP servers; if working in Gordon, deploy to Claude Desktop for production use.
source_title: Docker Just Made Using MCP Servers 100x Easier

claim: Claude Desktop connects to Docker MCP Catalog servers; after adding servers, restart Claude Desktop to load new MCP_Docker server with all tools
actionable: Add servers in Docker Catalog, click 'Connect' to Claude Desktop, restart app; all tools appear under single MCP_Docker server entry.
source_title: Docker Just Made Using MCP Servers 100x Easier

claim: n8n agents can connect to Docker MCP Gateway via HTTP-streaming; set host.docker.internal:8089 for local agents in containers
actionable: In n8n MCP client config, use host.docker.internal:8089 for local Docker MCP Gateway; set transport to HTTP-streaming; authentication optional for localhost.
source_title: Docker Just Made Using MCP Servers 100x Easier
